Title: VPN / Secure data upload for field devices

Owner: IT lead

Description:
Configure secure data upload for field devices. Preferred approach: WireGuard + SFTP/HTTPS ingestion endpoint. Include:
- VPN server provisioning playbook or manual steps
- Device configuration instructions
- Operational runbook for outages

Acceptance criteria:
- WireGuard server template created and tested locally
- Device config examples available in `docs/VPN_INFRASTRUCTURE.md`

Labels: infra, high-priority
